title: Regarding Sam Solum — Paige drunken kiss fallout, Sam-as-girl-to-lead frame
html:
Regarding Sam Solum — Paige drunken kiss fallout, Sam-as-girl-to-lead frame

Source: 2024-04-30 Google Doc. Pre-Asia trip relationship reflection on Sam Solum. The most explicit "what I'm trying to be for Sam" doc in the corpus.

TL;DR

  • The triggering event: Yahir drunkenly kissed Paige months earlier; the consequences finally manifest this week. Paige frames it like Yahir came onto her — likely true. Yahir self-criticizes: "reciprocating anything puts her at fault, why even put yourself in that position."
  • Sam's collateral damage: Sam (Paige's roommate) is moving out, has cut off Paige and her tri-delt friends. "She is going thru it." Sam rightfully points out the consequences won't really hit Yahir because he's leaving for ~6 months (Asia trip).
  • Sam's "amargada": Yahir's instinct is to be uncomfortable with her displayed-on-sleeve heaviness, but he's working to be "the most understanding and reasonable person."
  • The October catalyst: Yahir really saw Sam in October when "Paige locked herself out of her room" — moment he was "caught in her web." Used Paige as proxy to get closer, both wary at first.
  • Winter-term escalation: dinner dates, sometimes ending at one of their places. Yahir kept pursuing despite hesitancy on both sides — wanting reassurance from her before admitting what he wanted.
  • The Flanigan frame (re: Sam): "Sam is the type of girl that needs decisions to be made for her. You own her, I own her. She exists to serve you, and you must lead her in that manner. Never exploit or overreach, that is for absolute cowards." — possessive-protective masculinity model Yahir is testing.
  • The yearn: "Sam is special and she doesnt know it. Maybe she isnt special and she is as basic and prepackaged as they come, but I'll show her new sides to herself that she didnt know existed. I want to love her. I want to be loved by her."
  • The constraint: Yahir leaving for Asia / China collapses everything. "Leaving is going to collapse a lot of things, but for now I want to maximize the weeks that we have remaining."

Pattern observed

This is the Sam arc at its most committed — by the May 2024 docs Sam is being framed as girlfriend-shaped, by the October "things ending with Sam" doc the relationship has unraveled. Compare to the Feb 2024 Valentine's doc where Yahir was "not head over heels" about Sam — the April escalation is real.

The Flanigan-quoted gender frame (girl-needs-to-be-led) is the most explicit articulation of the Yahir as leader self concept applied to romance — same template that drives the Austin "I will bend reality to my will" register.

This is also pre-Emily by ~16 months. The yearning structure is identical (girl-doesn't-know-she's-special, I-will-show-her), suggesting a recurring romantic template Yahir applies. Worth synthesizing.

Key quotes

  • "I get a high when I'm around her sometimes. Like I feel the air around us morphing and my being gravitates towards her."
  • "Sam is your girl and you love her... Sam is special and she doesn't know it."
  • "I cannot get distracted with her and leave my other things in the dust."

Open questions

  • Sam Solum vs the existing sam.md entity — same person? (Yes, per arc context.)
  • Flanigan — quoted source of gender-frame; identity not stubbed (recurring single mention).
  • Paige — implied roommate-and-instigator; identity not stubbed.
